content.en:
Subsequently.

Ye Tian erased the remnants of the primordial black beasts one by one, and the primordial shrine no longer existed.

The Toothless Gate.

Ye Tian told the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor that after the Taihan Holy Ancestor had fallen and the Primordial Divine Palace no longer existed, he continued to retreat and cultivate.

And at this time, the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor and other original ancestors were shocked.

"The Endless Primordial Ancestor can kill the Taihan Holy Ancestor!"

They know exactly what that means.

That is, Ye Tian's strength can already kill most of the half-step sixfold ancestors, which is definitely comparable to the top half-step sixfold ancestors, and even more powerful.

"I'm afraid my current strength is not necessarily the opponent of the Endless Origin Ancestor!"

The Void Tooth Holy Ancestor said secretly.

Of course, the stronger Ye Tian's strength is, the better it is for the Void Tooth Holy Sect.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian worked hard to improve his cultivation, striving to raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the Fifth Rank Primordial Ancestor, in that case, his strength would be raised to an extremely terrifying level, and perhaps he could kill a top half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor in seconds with just one hand.

Before you know it, more than 800,000 years of the Origin Era have passed.

During these years, the Upper Spirit Origin Domain was very peaceful, and nothing major happened.

And Ye Tian continued to cultivate, and he finally improved his cultivation to the peak realm of the Fifth Ancestral Ancestor, but the resources were almost consumed, and he even spent a lot of resources on the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

"The resources I consume far exceed those of the other Fivefold Origin Ancestors, fortunately, I have robbed the resources of the Origin God Palace, otherwise, just relying on the Void Tooth Holy Gate and my own resources, I don't know how much Origin Domain Era will have to spend to raise my cultivation to the peak realm of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor!" Ye Tian muttered.

When you reach the peak realm of the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, the next step is to become a half-step Sixfold Primordial Ancestor.

And at this moment, he already knew how the Fivefold Peak Ancestor became a half-step Sixfold Ancestor, and how to become the inheritance knowledge of the Sixfold Ancestor.

If the Five-Fold Peak Ancestor wants to become a half-step six-fold Ancestor, he must slash the Will Pagoda.

Ye Tian knew that the method of breakthrough was at this time, and he was immediately shocked.

But it's true!

For example, a five-fold peak ancestor has seventy-two layers of will pagoda, and he must cut off one layer, and then use this section to condense the will clone, and then fuse with the body, and after complete fusion, he can break the shackles in the underworld.

Of course, you can't indiscriminately cut off the Pagoda of Will, that will cause the Pagoda of Will's to suffer a heavy blow.

It is necessary to perfectly cut off a layer of the Will Pagoda with the Extreme Dao Slashing Technique, so that the Will Pagoda can not be damaged.

However, it is too difficult to perfectly cut off a layer of Will Pagoda, once it fails, the Will Pagoda is damaged, and countless treasures have to be prepared to repair the Will Pagoda, and it is impossible to impact the half-step Sixfold Ancestor Realm again in a short period of time.

Basically, the average fix is waiting for a million Protodomain epochs.

In other words, once the impact fails, it is best not to impact the half-step sixfold Origin Ancestor realm for the second time within the One Million Origin Domain Era.

Most of the existences that were able to cultivate to the peak of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor were Saint Son-level Origin Ancestors who had condensed seventy-two extreme extreme paths, and even so, their failure rate was terrifying.

And, with each more failure, the more difficult it is to fix and the longer it takes to wait.

For example, the Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor of the Void Fang Holy Gate has already failed eighteen times, and now it will take endless years to slowly repair the Will Pagoda, even if it is hundreds of millions of Origin Domain Eras, they will not dare to attack the nineteenth time again.

"For me, it's very simple to impact the half-step sixfold primordial ancestor, even if it fails, I can just copy another copy body, and I can continuously impact the half-step sixfold primordial ancestor realm!"

Of course, if Ye Tian chose to attack the half-step Sixfold Ancestor, there would be no difficulty at all.

He has condensed three hundred and sixty-five extreme demons, and the chance of impacting a half-step sixfold ancestor is nearly one hundred percent, and even the chance of becoming a sixfold ancestor is fifty percent!

"I have already cultivated to the peak of the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, I only need to thoroughly comprehend the Extreme Dao Slashing Technique, and then stabilize the realm of the peak of the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, and then I can go to the half-step Sixfold Primordial Ancestor!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, it took him a while to thoroughly comprehend the inheritance of the Extreme Dao Slashing Technique, and the cultivation realm was also completely stabilized, so he was ready to impact the half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm.

......

"Endless Ancestor, are you going to impact the half-step Sixfold Ancestor?"

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"With your potential, there should be more than ninety percent hope!" said the Void Tooth Saint Ancestor.

"Ten percent!"

Ye Tian said modestly at all.

With his current strength, there is no need to be modest, even in the face of the Sixfold Ancestor, he is fearless.

Therefore, there is little point in being modest.

"Ten percent!"

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor gasped, Ye Tian's confidence was too much!

But when I think of it, Ye Tian is so demonic, there must be some hole cards, ten percent may not be an exaggeration.

"Endless Ancestor, you go and break through, when you become a half-step Sixfold Ancestor, the position of Deputy Sect Master is yours!" said the Void Fang Saint Ancestor.

"Good!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

He actually didn't value the position of the deputy sect master, and when he became a half-step sixfold ancestor, the Void Tooth Holy Gate would have no meaning to him.

However, he has been able to grow up to this day, and the Void Tooth Holy Gate has indeed helped him a lot, and he will also take over the position of this deputy sect master and develop the Void Tooth Holy Gate well.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went to the Primordial Black Mountain to impact the half-step sixfold primordial ancestor realm, and many fifth-fold primordial ancestors were very much looking forward to Ye Tian's impact this time.

If Ye Tian succeeded in breaking through, then the Void Tooth Holy Gate would become one of the most powerful fivefold holy gates in the entire Upper Spirit Origin Domain and even the entire Ancient Origin Domain.

Proto-Montenegro.

Ye Tian summoned the Will Pagoda, and the three hundred and sixty-five layers of the Will Pagoda suppressed the endless time and space.

And then, Ye Tian condensed the Extreme Dao Slashing Sword with his Extreme Dao Will, and used it to cut off a layer of Will Pagoda.

The combination of the extreme path and the will of the extreme path gradually turned into an extreme slashing knife.

It took a long time to condense and succeed.

Immediately, Ye Tian directly aimed at the topmost Willpower Pagoda, that is, the layer of the Willpower Pagoda engraved with the Endless Extreme Dao, and directly slashed it with a knife.

Click!

This layer of the Pagoda of Will was perfectly cut down.

Immediately, Ye Tian used this layer of will pagoda to condense the will clone.

After a long time, the will clone was successfully condensed, and this special will clone could be fused with the body, but there was also the possibility of failure in this process.

Of course.

Ye Tian felt that he couldn't fail, so he directly began to fuse.

Finally, after three primordial eras, this fusion was completely completed.

And during the whole process, Ye Tian did not make any mistakes.

In the end, he successfully broke the shackles between the peak realm of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor and the half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor.

At this moment, Ye Tian's body began to transform, and countless primordial black sea energies poured in, prompting him to complete the final transformation.
